creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
I suggest to add such, or similar statement in the bottom of https://www.freebsd.org/:

> If you have FreeBSD installed, please consider reporting the stats about the hardware/software on your system by installing the package www/bsdstats. It helps developers to know which software and hardware is most used, and allows them to better focus their efforts.

This is because the system count of FreeBSD on bsdstats.org has been dropping. I guess the reason is that people aren't aware of it. It used to be 12,000+, and now it is <2,000.
